scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx tsc
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t dockazawa/warden-backend:latest -f backend/Dockerfile.prod ./backend && docker build -t dockazawa/warden-frontend:latest -f frontend/Dockerfile.prod ./frontend
scripts.docker:push: docker push dockazawa/warden-backend:latest && docker push dockazawa/warden-frontend:latest
scripts.docker:publish: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:push
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
